title: erodium × kolbianum
intro: Erodium × kolbianum is a hybrid plant species, commonly known as the red-stemmed geranium, which is a cross between Erodium ciliatum and Erodium laciniatum. It is valued for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The plant has been traditionally used to treat various health issues, such as wounds, skin conditions, and respiratory problems, due to its ability to promote healing and reduce inflammation. In herbal preparations, Erodium × kolbianum is often used to make teas, infusions, and topical creams, which are believed to provide health benefits such as reducing fever, relieving digestive issues, and soothing skin irritations.
